labels.value: API token is stored securely in the Extole API Named Credential
Generate a token in My Extole →
How to generate a long-lived token →
All data is up to date
No reports configured yet. Add a report in Settings to get started.
No program data available yet. Check back after the first sync.
Unable to connect to Extole. Please check your API token in Settings.
Sync pending — data will appear after the first sync.

labels.shortDescription: Tile footer when Extole source runner is not found (404)

labels.value: Add your Extole API token to the Named Credential in Salesforce Setup, then test your connection below.
Choose a report type to track in your dashboard.
Trigger your first sync to populate your dashboard with live data.
No records found for the current filter.
List View is not fully configured. Set the Field, Value, and Start Date in Settings.
The name shown on the dashboard tile for this report.

How to extract a single number from your report. Use First Row when your report returns a single summary row. Use Sum when your report returns one row per event or person and you want a total. Use Count when the number of rows is the metric.
The visualization shown beneath the metric value on the dashboard tile.
The rolling window or year-to-date period used when fetching this report.
The column from the report JSON that contains the primary metric value.
An error occurred. Please try again.
Sync completed with errors. Check the Sync Log for details.
scheduled reports found in your Extole account

labels.shortDescription: Show KPI Dashboard tab checkbox label

labels.value: Compare the current value to the value from this many days ago. The trend arrow and percentage on the dashboard tile are driven by this setting. If there is not enough history yet, no trend arrow will appear.
Logs detailed HTTP request and response data for each sync. Useful for diagnosing sync failures or unexpected values. Disable in production to avoid accumulating large amounts of log data.

labels.shortDescription: Description of the clear debug logs action
labels.value: Clear Debug Logs removes all debug log records from this org.
How often Extole data is automatically pulled into Salesforce. Hourly keeps tiles fresh throughout the day; Nightly is suitable for most daily-summary reports.

labels.shortDescription: Notify on sync failure field tooltip
labels.value: When enabled, an email alert is sent if consecutive sync attempts fail. Use this to catch API token expiry or connectivity issues early.

labels.shortDescription: Notify after N failures field tooltip
labels.value: Number of consecutive failures before the alert email is sent. Set to 1 to be notified on the first failure; set higher to tolerate occasional transient errors.
Email address that receives sync failure alerts. Defaults to the org admin address if left blank.
Configure SFDC → Extole event flows. No code required.
Connect a Salesforce trigger to an Extole event in minutes — no Apex, no Zapier, no developer required.

labels.shortDescription: Event configurator empty state action button
Event configurator modal edit title prefix
Field set to value trigger option

labels.value: Opportunity — StageName equals Closed Won → opportunity_closedwon
Build from scratch — any object, any condition
The event_name value sent to Extole. Must match the event name configured in your Extole program (e.g. lead_created, opportunity_closedwon).
Required. Maps to the contact email for the Extole event. Save is blocked if unmapped.

labels.shortDescription: Partner user ID parameter field label

labels.value: Required. A stable unique identifier for the person associated with this event. Defaults to the record Id.
app_type: salesforce_crm is automatically injected into every event payload.
If a mapped field has no value on a record, that parameter will be excluded from the event payload.

labels.shortDescription: Warning when no email-like field detected
labels.value: No standard email field detected on this object. Map a related field containing an email address or enter a static value.

labels.shortDescription: Object row label in review summary
Trigger row label in review summary
Event name row label in review summary
Field mappings section header in review
Generated artifacts section header in review
Apex class name label in review

labels.value: These names are shown for reference. The Apex class and Flow are generated and deployed automatically.

labels.shortDescription: Test with sample record section header

labels.value: Preview the exact JSON payload that would be sent to Extole for a specific record — without actually sending it.
Deploying… This may take up to 30 seconds.
Event flow deployed and activated successfully.
Changes compared to the currently deployed configuration.

labels.shortDescription: Record ID input label in test section
Trigger condition changed note in diff
Delete confirmation message when event not in use
labels.value: This event is not referenced by any active Extole campaigns. Are you sure you want to delete this event flow? This will deactivate the associated Flow and cannot be undone.

labels.shortDescription: Delete warning message when event is in active use
labels.value: This event is used by an active Extole campaign. Deleting it may break campaign behavior. Deactivation is recommended.

labels.shortDescription: Delete warning message when usage check failed
labels.value: We couldn't verify whether this event is in use by Extole campaigns. Deactivation is the safer option.

labels.shortDescription: Campaign label in delete found message
Deactivate primary button label in delete modal
Event log cleared success toast message

labels.value: Failed to load fields for the selected object.
Failed to delete the event flow.

labels.shortDescription: Validation error for required field unmapped
labels.value: Both email and partner_user_id must be mapped before saving.

labels.shortDescription: Validation error for missing event name
Validation error when event name is already in use
labels.value: This event name is already in use.
The Salesforce object that will trigger the Extole event when records are created or updated.
The condition that must be true for the event to fire. Field Set To and Field Changes let you target specific field values.
The event_name value sent to Extole. This must match the event name in your Extole program configuration.
